## Summary

Describe the change.

## Type

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Template improvement
- [ ] Starter MCP server change
- [ ] Test or CI update

## Checks

- [ ] I ran npm test
- [ ] I ran npm run check
- [ ] I updated CHANGELOG.md if this changes public behavior

## Public Boundary

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, passwords, cookies, or credentials
- [ ] No private client materials
- [ ] No Re-BIRTH internal repository content
- [ ] No MIRAI Memory engine code
- [ ] No working memory MCP implementation
- [ ] No full paid product files
